items.name: Rose YEMELI
items.role: Director YSO Conseils - CEO Smart Data Pay
items.text: His expertise in web development and software engineering has revolutionized our HR platform through AI. His professionalism and ability to solve complex problems have been essential in the design of our AI platform.

items.name: Hervé Franck ELOUNDOU
items.role: SAP S/4HANA EAM, CPI & Field Service Management Consultant | Odoo
items.text: I had the opportunity to work with Aurelien for over a year. Technically very strong, with a great capacity for analysis and design in software development — I recommend him if you need to build a web and/or mobile application.

items.name: Dr Albert MAMBO
items.role: Regional Delegate for Public Health for the Littoral
items.text: Their exemplary work on MAMALPRO has greatly improved our public health platforms. Their technical expertise, professionalism and speed of response have been essential to optimize our communication and data management.

items.name: Moses Tamunang
items.text: His technical expertise and creativity have been crucial to the success of our projects. His professionalism and ability to solve complex problems make him an invaluable asset to any team. One of the best developers I have worked with.

items.name: Fernand Hervé
items.role: Founder of MCS · Consultant at Capgemini

items.name: Carlson N. NDANGA
items.role: IT & Business Systems Analyst | ERP, ServiceNow & M365 | Power BI & Fabric | Automation & AI-Enabled Insights
